raw.message: 😻🐾 Katz-tastische Puppenhaus-Welt für kleine & große Gabby-Fans 🏠😻

hook.summary: A child interacts with the elevator mechanism of a physical Gabby's Dollhouse toy.
hook.visual_action: Hands place a character into a pink cup and slide it down a teal tower.

scene_flow: Close-up of hands operating the elevator tower mechanism.
Wide shot of the dollhouse being opened to reveal interior rooms.
Close-up of the Gabby character descending in the elevator.
Final shot of the character arriving at the bottom of the play set.
audience_proxy: Parents of preschool-aged children who are fans of the Gabby's Dollhouse animated series.
